holdings.infoBox: MUU is an equity ETF with a total of 16 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily MU Bull 2X ETF (MUU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Micron Technology, Inc. stock. MUU was launched on Oct 10, 2024 and is issued by Direxion.
